articles.title: Our final Japanese Grand Prix betting predictions
articles.summary: Our final Japanese Grand Prix betting predictions. Our expert betting writers make their final predictions before the action gets underway in Japan.

articles.title: Our Bet Builder picks after Antonelli’s Japan pole
articles.summary: Our Bet Builder picks after Antonelli’s Japan pole. F1's expert betting writers have picked their four Bet Builder selections for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Wolff explains Russell’s ‘disadvantage’ in Japanese GP
articles.summary: Wolff explains Russell’s ‘disadvantage’ in Japanese GP. Toto Wolff has conceded that George Russell with face a “disadvantage” entering the Japanese Grand Prix, with the team boss admitting that his driver will have to carry the issue he experienced in Qualifying forwards to race day.

articles.title: Hadjar names Red Bull's 'end goal' in Japanese GP
articles.summary: Hadjar names Red Bull's 'end goal' in Japanese GP. Isack Hadjar admits that while scoring points in the Japanese Grand Prix is the goal, the ultimate priority is "to understand how we can make that car faster" after another difficult Qualifying session for Red Bull.

articles.title: Lindblad outlines his bold approach to Q3 appearance in Japan
articles.summary: Lindblad outlines his bold approach to Q3 appearance in Japan. Arvid Lindblad relied on his courage in order to progress to Q3 at the Japanese Grand Prix for Racing Bulls.

articles.title: Watch Round 2 of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship
articles.summary: Watch Round 2 of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship. The second round of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship gets underway on Saturday with drivers set to race at the Suzuka International Circuit.

articles.title: What the teams said – Qualifying in Japan
articles.summary: What the teams said – Qualifying in Japan. The drivers and teams report back on all the action from final practice and Qualifying at Suzuka ahead of the 2026 Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Watch Qualifying from Round 2 of the F1 Sim Racing World Championship
articles.summary: Watch Qualifying from Round 2 of the F1 Sim Racing World Championship. It’s time for Round 2 of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship, with the sim racers preparing to go head-to-head at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Ride onboard with Antonelli for his superb pole lap in Japan
articles.summary: Ride onboard with Antonelli for his superb pole lap in Japan. Kimi Antonelli took a commanding pole position for the Japanese Grand Prix as Mercedes locked out the front row once again.

articles.title: What are the strategy options for the Japanese Grand Prix?
articles.summary: What are the strategy options for the Japanese Grand Prix?. Matt Youson takes a look at the different pit stop and tyre options that are available to the teams on race day at Suzuka.

articles.title: Mercedes set for toughest challenge of the season so far in Japan
articles.summary: Mercedes set for toughest challenge of the season so far in Japan. Mercedes has been untouchable so far this season, but in Japan, it looks set to face challenges on multiple fronts.

articles.title: ‘Nice to be closer’ to Mercedes after Japanese GP qualifying P3 - Piastri
articles.summary: ‘Nice to be closer’ to Mercedes after Japanese GP qualifying P3 - Piastri. Oscar Piastri was happy to be nearer to Mercedes in qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix, but says McLaren still needs to find pace and grip.

articles.title: Verstappen beyond frustrated as 2026 woes continue in Japan
articles.summary: Verstappen beyond frustrated as 2026 woes continue in Japan. Max Verstappen said “I'm not even frustrated anymore, I'm beyond that,” as his discontent with Formula 1 this season continued with a tricky qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Ferrari drivers struggle with deployment issues in final part of Suzuka qualifying
articles.summary: Ferrari drivers struggle with deployment issues in final part of Suzuka qualifying. Ferrari's Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton were held back by their engine's energy deployment in the final part of qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli leads Mercedes front-row lockout in Japan
articles.summary: Antonelli leads Mercedes front-row lockout in Japan. Kimi Antonelli secured his second consecutive pole position as Mercedes was untouchable in qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Mercedes back on top in final practice at Suzuka
articles.summary: Mercedes back on top in final practice at Suzuka. Kimi Antonelli returned Mercedes to the top of the time sheet for final practice at the Japanese Grand Prix, with teammate George Russell making it a Mercedes 1-2.

articles.title: Suzuka FP1 outing ‘pretty incredible’ for Crawford despite limited running
articles.summary: Suzuka FP1 outing ‘pretty incredible’ for Crawford despite limited running. Aston Martin reserve driver Jak Crawford described the Suzuka circuit is “pretty incredible to drive" despite being limited to three flying laps during his FP1 outing for the team at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Honda says Aston Martin’s chassis, not just its power unit, is a factor in vibration problems
articles.summary: Honda says Aston Martin’s chassis, not just its power unit, is a factor in vibration problems. Honda Racing Corporation President Koji Watanabe says the vibration issues being suffered by Aston Martin are not solely down to the power unit itself, but also its integration with the chassis.

articles.title: McLaren downplays Friday pace at Suzuka
articles.summary: McLaren downplays Friday pace at Suzuka. McLaren says its Friday pace is likely to be an outlier despite Oscar Piastri setting the fastest time during the second practice session for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Piastri puts McLaren on top in second Japanese GP practice session
articles.summary: Piastri puts McLaren on top in second Japanese GP practice session. After shadowing the two Mercedes earlier in the day, McLaren's Oscar Piastri topped the field in Friday's second practice session for the Japanese GP at Suzuka.

articles.title: 'A lot of stuff to figure out' for Verstappen - and F1's rule-makers
articles.summary: 'A lot of stuff to figure out' for Verstappen - and F1's rule-makers. Red Bull's Max Verstappen and Formula 1's bosses have plenty to ponder after Japanese Grand Prix qualifying.

articles.title: Antonelli beats Russell to Japanese Grand Prix pole
articles.summary: Antonelli beats Russell to Japanese Grand Prix pole. Kimi Antonelli takes his second pole position in a row as he beats Mercedes team-mate George Russell in qualifying at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: How to follow Japanese Grand Prix on the BBC
articles.summary: How to follow Japanese Grand Prix on the BBC. All the key BBC coverage details for the Japanese Grand Prix, which takes place from 27-29 March.

articles.title: F1: Chequered Flag
articles.summary: F1: Chequered Flag. Who would prevail in the pole shootout at the Japanese GP?

articles.title: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions
articles.summary: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions. Our F1 correspondent Andrew Benson is doing a weekly Q&A this season, so get your questions in now.

articles.title: Russell surprised by McLaren pace in Japan practice
articles.summary: Russell surprised by McLaren pace in Japan practice. McLaren's Oscar Piastri sets the pace in second practice at the Japanese Grand Prix ahead of the Mercedes of Kimi Antonelli and George Russell.

articles.title: 'Get out' - Verstappen expels journalist from news conference
articles.summary: 'Get out' - Verstappen expels journalist from news conference. Max Verstappen ejects a journalist from his news conference at the Japanese Grand Prix over a row that dates back to Abu Dhabi last year.

articles.title: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson
articles.summary: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson. On the latest episode of the The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird say Kimi Antonelli's Chinese Grand Prix win at 19 years old "is as big as it comes" for a young driver, after the Italian was moved to tears following his win.

articles.title: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP
articles.summary: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag podcast, Sam Bird believes Lewis Hamilton's spark "is back" again after the British driver finished in third at the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird
articles.summary: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird discuss the cancellation of the Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix cancellations and how the teams can turn the unexpected five-week gap into ...
